name: Dysfunctional Household
description:
A “normal” house with a Christian Mother, Conspiracy theorist husband, Centrist Son and Gothic daughter.

[appreciate any critique, idrc if it’s mean]

To be completely transparent, every member of the family is based of someone in my life (sadly even Lilith), that’s why I didn’t really want to any of the every on irrideemable.

The idea of this bot was a whim I had after joking about being gay to my mom and being yelled at.
